_finding: || D-377 DISPOSITION (Bryan, 2026-07-21): QUARANTINED as load-sensitive ORACLE-side nondeterminism — 'xfail this damned thing and call it non-deterministic.' THE EVIDENCE ARC: D-365 censused 39 zero-flap measurements and CLOSED it; D-367 falsified that (2-of-3 make-diff flaps under parallel load); the 2026-07-21 release night buried it — ~17 CI differential flaps across 4 push events including SIX CONSECUTIVE attempts on the v0.4.50 tag run, while the same commit's main-run differential passed first try. THE SIGNATURE, IDENTICAL EVERY TIME: firing[10] differs — engine R5 [T1(f0=true)] vs oracle R3 [T1(f0=false), T1(f0=true)]; the oracle's QUIET (sequential/unloaded) answer matches the engine in every measurement ever taken (sequential PASS 3x reconfirmed at disposition on this box). Mechanism deliberately UNNAMED (method law: the load-sensitive agenda swap is the observation, not a mechanism claim); candidate class = the fz_42_84 oracle-nondet family. WHAT THIS KEEPS: the engine-side pin survives in FULL via the xfail-drift bank (engine output deterministic, gated every make diff); only the oracle-parity claim is dropped — an oracle that answers by coin flip under load certifies nothing. If a future oracle bump or census names the mechanism, re-graduation is one file move.
drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $a0_0 : ArrayList() from collect( T1(f0 != false) )
    accumulate( T1(f0 != true); $a0_1 : count() )
    not T1(f0 == false)
then
end
rule "R1"
salience 10
when
    T1(f0 in (true, true), f0 in (false), f0 != true || f0 != false, $b1_0_0 : f0)
then
end
rule "R2"
when
    T1(f0 == false, f0 != false, $b2_0_0 : f0)
    T1($b2_1_0 : f0)
then
end
rule "R3"
when
    T1(f0 != true, $b3_0_0 : f0)
    T1($b3_1_0 : f0)
then
end
rule "R4"
when
    T0(f0 not in (100, -2.0, 5.5))
then
    insertLogical(new T1(true));
end
rule "R5"
when
    $p5_0 : T1(f0 == true, f0 != false, $b5_0_0 : f0, $b5_0_1 : f0)
then
    delete($p5_0);
end
name: fz_123_6887
